LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CHECKR, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, DISMISS CLASS CLAIMS, AND STAY PROCEEDINGS. MATTER CONTESTED, ARGUMENT IS HELD, AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH THE FOLLOWING MODIFICATIONS: THE COURT DELETED THE LAST PARAGRAPH OF THE TENTATIVE RULING, STATED THAT THE CLASS CLAIMS ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, AND STAYED THE PROCEEDINGS PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF ARBITRATION. DEFENDANT CHECKR, INC.'S (CHECKR) MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. MR. FLIEGEL IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S TENTATIVE WITH THE MODIFICATIONS. CRC 3.1312 COMPLIANCE IS REQUIRED. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. COURT REPORTER: NANCY PRESANT, CSR 	906, TEL. 888.707.8366, EMAIL: CONCIERGE@STENO.COM, BAILIFF: C. LOKE. (301/RCE) **** AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT SIGNS AN ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT CHECKR, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, DISMISS CLASS CLAIMS AND STAY PROCEEDINGS. (SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.)****

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration, Dismiss Class Claims, And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Nov-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
James Treglio, Esq., appearing for the Plaintiff Nicholas Bahr;
Rod Fliegel, Esq., appearing for Defendant Checkr, Inc.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT CHECKR, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration, Dismiss Class Claims, And Stay Proceedings.

The matter is contested. Argument is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling with modifications. The Court deleted the last paragraph of the tentative ruling, stated that the class claims are dismissed without prejudice, and that the proceedings are stayed pending the conclusion of arbitration:

Defendant Checkr, Inc.'s (Checkr) motion to compel arbitration is granted. The proceedings are stayed pending the conclusion of the arbitration.

Mr. Fliegel is to prepare and submit a proposed order that tracks the court's tentative with the modifications set forth on the record today. CRC 3.1312 compliance is required.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Nancy Presant, CSR 906, Tel. 888.707.8366, Email: concierge@steno.com, Bailiff: C. Loke. (301/RCE)

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN LINDEKILDE , AN INDIVIDUAL, BLACK SWAN EQUITY PARTNERS LLP, A UNITED KINGDOM DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT

This matter is contested. Argument is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Hearing re: CROSS-DEFENDANTS CHRISTIAN LINDEKILDE, AN INDIVIDUAL, BLACK SWAN EQUITY PARTNERS LLP'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT.

Cross-defendants' demurrer to cause of action one for violation of Corporations Code section 25210(a) is sustained without leave to amend.

Cross-defendants' demurrer to cause of action two for breach of contract is overruled.

Cross-defendants' demurrer to the UCL cause of action is overruled.

Cross-defendants' demurrer to the declaratory judgment cause of action is overruled.

Ms. Taran is to prepare and submit a proposed order that tracks the substantive portion of the tentative ruling verbatim.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Bailiff: C. Loke.
(301/RCE)

**** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting Defendant Checkr, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration, dismiss class claims and stay proceedings. (See signed order for complete ruling.)****
